name: Miradore
description: Miradore is a cross-platform Mobile Device Management (MDM) solution for managing Android, iOS, macOS, and Windows devices. This integration checks device inventory, compliance status, encryption, and OS update status.

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to your Miradore console at https://online.miradore.com
2. Go to System > Infrastructure diagram
3. Click 'Create key' to generate an API key
4. Copy the API key
5. Note your site name (the subdomain in your Miradore URL)
6. Paste both values below

Note: API access requires a Business or Enterprise plan.

credentialFields.label: Site Name
credentialFields.helpText: Your Miradore site name (the subdomain part of your Miradore URL, e.g., if your URL is https://online.miradore.com/mycompany, enter 'mycompany')

credentialFields.label: API Key
credentialFields.helpText: API authentication key generated from Miradore web console (System > Infrastructure diagram > Create key)

checks.name: App Availability
checks.description: Verifies connectivity to the Miradore API by fetching device data with a minimal query

checks.name: Device List
checks.description: Enumerates all managed devices in Miradore with platform, status, and model information

checks.name: Device Compliance
checks.description: Checks device security compliance across all platforms by verifying security configurations such as passcode presence, rooting/jailbreak status

checks.name: Encryption Status
checks.description: Checks disk encryption status on managed devices by examining storage and security encryption properties

checks.name: OS Update Status
checks.description: Checks whether managed devices have current operating system versions by examining OS inventory data
